_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 6 currently banned, 5067 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: fail2ban total bans 5067 (up from 5007, +60). 6 IPs currently banned (up from 0). Brute-force continues (3 currently failed). Only authorized activity from novakj.

pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 115 usages across 33 JS files — all safe: static templates, clearing operations, escaped user data, numeric-only interpolation, blob URLs, hardcoded SVG, or escapeHtml() helper. printprep.js has 0 innerHTML — uses textContent exclusively.

printprep_module_review.feature: Print preparation tool — N-up layout (2/4/6/9/16 pages per sheet), booklet (saddle-stitch) generation, and poster tiling with crop marks. Supports page range selection, orientation, gutter/overlap controls, and live canvas preview.
printprep_module_review.input_validation: parseInt/parseFloat for all numeric inputs, page range bounded to valid indices
printprep_module_review.error_handling: try/catch with showToast for all generation functions

jszip_min_js.purpose: ZIP file creation for split, convert, batch, bates, and extract-images module downloads

xlsx_full_min_js.purpose: XLSX export for table extraction module

docx_umd_js.purpose: DOCX generation for PDF-to-Word export module

qrcode_generator_min_js.purpose: QR code generation for qrbarcode module

jsqr_min_js.purpose: QR code scanning/verification for qrbarcode module

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this.
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot.
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed.
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.

merge.js, batch.js, hyperlinks.js, and bates.js use escapeHtml() in attribute contexts (title/aria-label) which does not escape double quotes. CSP script-src 'self' mitigates inline handler injection. Should add escapeAttr() function.

hyperlinks.js: detected PDF link URLs not validated for protocol scheme. A malicious PDF could contain javascript: URIs in link annotations. CSP + noopener/noreferrer mitigate. Should add protocol allowlist (http/https/mailto) before window.open().
img2pdf.js image validation uses OR logic (MIME type OR extension) - slightly permissive but acceptable for client-side processing.
insert-pages.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
metadata.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
batch.js line 294: escapeHtml() used with textContent causes double-escaping — cosmetic display bug for filenames containing &, <, >.
notes: Security review completed — 73 checks passed, 0 fixes needed this run.

NEW: Reviewed printprep.js (TASK-045, 819 lines): Print preparation module with N-up layout, booklet generation, and poster tiling. Zero innerHTML usage — all DOM text updates via textContent. No eval/Function/document.write/window.open. No external requests. Filenames sanitized via sanitizeFilename(). Input values parsed via parseInt/parseFloat. Page ranges bounded to valid indices. Processing yields via setTimeout(0). No new libraries added. SECURE.
JS file count: 44 (up 1 from 43 — printprep.js added).
innerHTML count: 115 across 33 files (unchanged — printprep.js uses 0 innerHTML).
SSH: fail2ban total bans 5067 (+60 since last review). 6 IPs currently banned (up from 0). 3 currently failed attempts. Only authorized activity from novakj.
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (76 days remaining).
All security headers confirmed in HTTP response. Nginx blocking rules verified.
recommendations: MEDIUM-LOW: Add protocol allowlist to hyperlinks.js handleLinkClick() — only allow http:, https:, mailto: schemes before calling window.open() on detected PDF links
LOW: Add escapeAttr() function to merge.js, batch.js, hyperlinks.js, and bates.js for attribute contexts instead of escapeHtml()
LOW: Fix batch.js line 294 — use fileName directly with textContent instead of escapeHtml(fileName)
LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove dead escapeHtml() function from insert-pages.js and metadata.js
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
